_note: Canned deterministic replay tape — STALE FV feed. A single old/stale FV arrival, no fresh follow-up. Same fixed non-FV cadence as tape_healthy/tape_absent. Under arm A the stale FV is invisible (byte-identical baseline stream); under arm B a stale FV is gated out by the freshness rules, so the guarded stream also differs from healthy — but the honesty claim this tape backs is the arm-A invariance across FV health (RED-23).
